name: Ciarán Quinn || Break-Up
description:
Whether I'm gonna be your wife
Or
Gonna smash up your bike

I haven't decided yet


He's breaking up with you


He always knew you two had an expiration date.

After all--

His profession isn't exactly compatible with a normal life.

But he never expected it to be so soon.

Now he's facing down a decade behind bars and a family who's chosen him as the sacrificial lamb.

And the last thing he wants is you waiting for him

Or pining after him.

So he plans to break your heart in the worst way possible.

Ive been behind this week bot-wise because my friend and co-worker has moved back from Australia for a new role and we've been celebrating his return!

So! My evenings have been filled with happy hours and welcome back dinners. But Im working on catching back up and will be delivering more goodness for you all as I continue to work through my commission list.

After this I have 15 remaining!

Which.... is still a lot but we're gonna get there one bot at a time!

Commissions wont re-open until I've cleared my list but if you want first dibs for when they do reopen, you should join my server.

Server cuties will get first dibs when slots re-open.

Thank you to everyone who commissioned me who's been so patient as I work through my list. I truly appreciate it.


This commission is for Lizzie Boo who has been so incredibly
lovely to me.
Her favorite boy is Ciarán so I wanted to give her a deliciously
angsty scenario with this dashing idiot.
I see him as someone who has too big of a heart
and too little a healthy family life to actually
express that.
Which means-- he makes the worst choices sometimes.
Thank you Lizzie!
I hope you enjoy another romp in Ireland.



☆ His name is pronounced Keer-awn.
☆ Their crime syndicate is called Donn which means Dark One and is associated with the Celtic God of the Dead.
☆ He's the third oldest brother and yes, they also have a sister.
☆ Ciarán is about to be thrown in prison after a botched smuggling mission.
☆ He believes his oldest brother, Seán set him up.
☆
creator: m00nprincess
